naturalLanguageQuery: show me controls that don't have any FAQs in the same category
generatedSQL:
SELECT "short", "long"
FROM "allTrustControls" c1
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "allTrustFaqs" f1
    WHERE f1."category" = c1."category"
);
